languages.text: "Отвечу столь же прямо: я могу быть вам полез{mf|ен|на}. Просто скажите как".

traits.locale_text: "Отвечу столь же прямо: я могу быть вам полез{mf|ен|на}. Просто скажите как".

languages.text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."
languages.original_text: "Отвечу столь же прямо: я могу быть вам полез{mf|ен|на}. Просто скажите как".

traits.locale_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."
"I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."
"I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

languages.text: “那我就直说了，我能帮上你的忙。只要告诉我该怎么做就行。”
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: “那我就直说了，我能帮上你的忙。只要告诉我该怎么做就行。”

languages.text: « Moi non plus, je n'irai pas par quatre chemins : je peux vous être utile. Vous n'avez qu'à me dire comment. »
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: « Moi non plus, je n'irai pas par quatre chemins : je peux vous être utile. Vous n'avez qu'à me dire comment. »

languages.text: "Ben de aynı şekilde hiç lafı dolandırmadan karşılık vereceğim: Sana faydam dokunabilir. İsteğini dile getirmen yeterli."
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: "Ben de aynı şekilde hiç lafı dolandırmadan karşılık vereceğim: Sana faydam dokunabilir. İsteğini dile getirmen yeterli."

languages.text: «Responderé con la misma sencillez: puedo serle de utilidad. Dígame cómo».
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: «Responderé con la misma sencillez: puedo serle de utilidad. Dígame cómo».

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch ebenso offen antworten: Ich kann Euch nützlich sein. Sagt mir nur wie."
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch ebenso offen antworten: Ich kann Euch nützlich sein. Sagt mir nur wie."

languages.text: 「私はあなたに役立つことができます。ただ、どのように役立つべきか教えてください」
languages.original_text: "I'll answer just as plainly: I can be useful to you. Just tell me how."

traits.locale_text: 「私はあなたに役立つことができます。ただ、どのように役立つべきか教えてください」
